name: Camden Corner Sofa
description: A generous L-shaped corner sofa upholstered in warm grey fabric. Deep seats and high arms make this the centrepiece of any living room.

name: Ashford King Bed Frame
description: A solid oak king-size bed frame with a padded linen headboard. Clean lines and a natural finish suit both modern and traditional bedrooms.

name: Hadley Double Wardrobe
description: A double wardrobe with two hinged doors, internal rail and fixed shelf. Smooth-close hinges and brushed brass handles add a premium feel.

name: Marlowe Chest of Drawers
description: Five deep drawers with dovetail joints and solid wood runners. A timeless silhouette with modern proportions that fits any bedroom layout.

name: Stratford Dining Table
description: A six-seater extendable dining table in solid oak veneer. The central leaf extends from 160cm to 210cm to accommodate larger gatherings.

name: Kenilworth Bookcase
description: A tall five-shelf bookcase with adjustable shelving and a solid back panel. Sturdy enough for books, display pieces, or a home office setup.

name: Clifton TV Unit
description: A wide low-profile TV unit with two sliding doors and open central shelf. Cable management cutouts keep your setup tidy.

name: Evesham Armchair
description: A generously proportioned armchair with a solid beech frame and removable cushion covers. Perfect as a standalone statement or paired with a sofa.
